title: Preprocessor Lexer is not keeping track of braces depth level
body:
The preprocessor does not track braces depth level. It leads to errors when trying to pass arguments containing the "inside" keyword for instance.
```systemverilog
`define TEST_MACRO(arg) ``arg

`TEST_MACRO(signal inside{1, 2});  // error: too many arguments for `TEST_MACRO
```
code_blocks:
`define TEST_MACRO(arg) ``arg

`TEST_MACRO(signal inside{1, 2});  // error: too many arguments for `TEST_MACRO
